name: getFoundryStoryNavigation
description: High-level Foundry VTT campaign navigation helper. Use this when a smaller model needs a compact campaign map instead of stitching together many low-level journal calls. Returns likely playable entrypoints, anchor candidates for the current query, a chapter map, orientation/reference journals, and recommended journals to read next.

query.description: Optional current location, hook, scene hint, or story question. If provided, the tool prioritizes anchor candidates and recommended next journals around that query.

limit.description: Optional maximum number of entrypoints, anchors, orientation entries, and recommended next journal refs to return. Chapter map still covers the whole journal corpus.

channelKey.description: Optional override for the Foundry bridge channel key. Normally taken from toolsconfig.getFoundryBridge.channelKey.
